about.title: Who we are
about.intro: Founded 10 years ago in Douala, EasyTech Group SA has established itself as a reference player in IT solutions distribution across Africa. Through a network of over 200 manufacturer and publisher partners, we give African organizations access to the world's best technologies, with the local expertise to deploy them effectively.
about.intro2: With more than 100 certified experts and a presence in 8 countries (Cameroon, Chad, Côte d'Ivoire, Senegal, DRC, Congo, Nigeria, Kenya), EasyTech Group supports banks, SMEs and large enterprises in modernizing and securing their IT infrastructure.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Make the best IT solutions accessible to African organizations, with the expertise to integrate them sustainably.

visionMid.title: Mid-term vision
visionMid.text: Become the reference IT partner for fast-growing companies in sub-Saharan Africa.

visionLong.title: Long-term vision
visionLong.text: Build a sovereign digital Africa, equipped with the infrastructure and skills to compete on a global scale.

values.title: Expertise
values.text: Our teams are certified by the world's leading manufacturers. Every recommendation is grounded in real technical mastery.

values.title: Proximity
values.text: We are locally present in 8 African countries. A contact who knows you, in your time zone.

values.title: Reliability
values.text: We select proven solutions and guarantee their integration according to market best practices.

values.title: Excellence
values.text: We aim for long-term performance: solutions properly sized, integrated and maintained over time.

services.title: IT solutions for every need of your organization
services.subtitle: From workstation equipment to infrastructure security, EasyTech Group covers your entire IT ecosystem through a network of +200 global manufacturers and publishers.

services.whySubtitle: Having access to the world's best brands is one thing. Finding a partner capable of integrating them correctly in your African context is another. That is precisely what we have been doing for 10 years.

why.title: +200 manufacturers, one single contact
why.text: Instead of juggling multiple suppliers and contracts, you have a single partner able to address all your IT needs — hardware, software, networking, security — with the world's best manufacturers in our catalogue.

why.title: Certified experts on your technologies
why.text: Our 100+ experts are certified by the manufacturers we distribute (Cisco, Microsoft, Fortinet, HP, Dell…). You get real technical expertise, not just a reseller forwarding an order.

why.title: Local presence, global network
why.text: Present in 8 African countries, our teams understand the logistics, customs and technical realities of the continent. You access international standards with a partner who knows your ground.

why.title: Solutions sized for your context
why.text: No unnecessary over-specification, no risky under-sizing. We analyze your real needs and recommend solutions adapted to your size, sector and budget, with a long-term perspective.

why.title: 10 years of experience in Africa
why.text: For 10 years, we have delivered hundreds of IT projects across the African continent. This accumulated experience lets us anticipate difficulties before they arise and deliver on time.

why.title: After-sales support without borders
why.text: Our relationship does not end at delivery. Maintenance contracts, technical support, manufacturer warranty management and future upgrades: we remain your partner throughout the entire lifecycle of your solutions.

process.title: Needs audit
process.text: We analyze your existing infrastructure and objectives to define the most suitable solution.

process.title: Selection & Quote
process.text: We select the best solutions from +200 manufacturers and submit a detailed quote.

process.title: Delivery & Integration
process.text: Our experts deploy and configure the solutions in your environment, with testing and validation.

process.title: Ongoing support
process.text: We provide maintenance, updates and support throughout the entire lifecycle of the solutions.

contact.title: Let's talk about your IT project
contact.subtitle: Based in Douala and present in 8 African countries, our experts analyze your needs and propose the most suitable solutions from our catalogue of +200 global manufacturers, with no commitment.

form.name: Full name
form.needPlaceholder: Describe your project: type of solutions needed, existing infrastructure, desired timeline, approximate budget...
form.consent: I agree that my personal data (name, email, phone, organization) may be processed by EasyTech Group SA solely to respond to my request.
form.success: ✅ Thank you! Your request has been received. Our team will contact you within 24 to 48 business hours. You can also reach us directly at info@easytechgroup.net.
form.error: An error occurred while sending. Please try again or email us directly at info@easytechgroup.net.

items.q: How do I know which IT solution is right for my organization?
items.a: Our experts always start with an audit of your infrastructure and needs before making any recommendation. This initial exchange is free and without commitment. We only recommend what is genuinely useful in your context.

items.q: Do you offer hardware that is warranted and maintainable in Africa?
items.a: Yes. We only distribute brand-new hardware with manufacturer warranty. Our network of technicians in 8 African countries also provides on-site maintenance and faulty part replacement without excessive import delays.

items.q: Can you manage my entire IT estate (hardware + software)?
items.a: Absolutely. Through our network of +200 manufacturer and publisher partners, we cover your full IT needs: workstations, servers, networking, security, software and licenses. One single contact for everything.

items.q: Do you work with SMEs or only large enterprises?
items.a: We support all types of organizations: SMEs, micro-enterprises, large companies, banks and institutions. We propose solutions sized to your scale and budget, without selling you more than you need.

items.q: In which countries are you present?
items.a: EasyTech Group is present in Cameroon, Chad, Côte d'Ivoire, Senegal, DRC, Congo (Brazzaville/Libreville), Nigeria and Kenya. We can also manage projects in other African countries depending on needs.

items.q: How do you handle imports and delivery times?
items.a: Thanks to our 10 years of experience on the continent and our direct relationships with manufacturers, we master the customs and logistics procedures specific to each country. We provide a precise delivery estimate from the moment of order.

items.q: Do you offer maintenance contracts after delivery?
items.a: Yes. We offer preventive and corrective maintenance contracts tailored to your equipment, including on-site interventions, manufacturer warranty management, security updates and a dedicated technical hotline.

realisations.title: Concrete IT projects, delivered across Africa
realisations.subtitle: Every project is proof of our method: understand your environment, select the most suitable solutions, and ensure frictionless integration.
realisations.ctaTitle: Your project will be our next success story

projects.name: Network security for a banking group
projects.description: A regional banking group mandated us to secure its entire network infrastructure, made up of 12 interconnected branches. The project covered the replacement of obsolete equipment, the deployment of next-generation firewalls and the implementation of centralized supervision of the entire estate.
projects.challenge: Secure an aging and heterogeneous network infrastructure interconnecting 12 geographically dispersed sites, without interrupting daily banking operations.
projects.solution: Deployment of FortiGate firewalls across all sites, implementation of a secure MPLS VPN between branches, centralized supervision via FortiManager, and training of internal IT teams for day-to-day management.

projects.name: Full headquarters equipment
projects.description: A fast-growing industrial SME entrusted us with the complete equipment of its new headquarters: workstations, servers, network infrastructure, Microsoft 365 licenses and IP telephony system. The project was delivered in under 3 weeks, within the contractual deadlines.
projects.challenge: Equip 150 workstations and deploy a complete network infrastructure within tight deadlines, while ensuring equipment compatibility with existing business applications.
projects.solution: Selection and import of 150 HP PCs, deployment of a Dell server rack, Cat6 structured network cabling, Microsoft AD configuration, Microsoft 365 deployment and data migration from the old infrastructure.

projects.name: IoT infrastructure for an industrial site
projects.description: For an industrial operator in Gabon, we designed and deployed an IoT infrastructure enabling real-time supervision of all site equipment. More than 200 connected sensors transmit data to a centralized platform, enabling predictive maintenance and a significant reduction in unplanned downtime.
projects.challenge: Deploy a robust IoT solution in a demanding industrial environment (heat, humidity, vibrations), with sometimes limited connectivity, while integrating data into the existing supervision system.
projects.solution: Selection of IP67-certified industrial sensors, implementation of a redundant network architecture, deployment of a local IoT gateway for data buffering, and integration with the existing SCADA platform via API.

projects.name: Cloud migration for a public institution
projects.description: Mandated by an Ivorian public institution, we led the migration of 500 agents from an aging office infrastructure to Microsoft 365. The project included an audit of the existing setup, selection of the optimal licensing plan, data migration and user and IT team training.
projects.challenge: Migrate 500 agents to the cloud without interrupting administrative services, while optimizing the licensing budget and supporting users unfamiliar with modern collaborative tools.
projects.solution: Existing estate audit, negotiation of an optimized Microsoft 365 Government plan, migration in waves of 50 users over 4 weeks, in-person training sessions and dedicated documentation provided to each department.

realisations.ctaSub: Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us about your infrastructure and your objectives.

approachSteps.title: Analyze
approachSteps.text: We take time to audit your existing infrastructure, technical constraints and budget before making any recommendation.

approachSteps.title: Integrate
approachSteps.text: Solution selection from our +200 manufacturer catalogue, delivery, configuration and integration into your environment, turnkey.

approachSteps.title: Sustain
approachSteps.text: Team training, maintenance contract, warranty follow-up and technical support: we stay your partner long after delivery.

realisations.heroSub: Every project delivered is an infrastructure that performs, a secured organization, and a client who trusts us for what comes next.

footer.tagline: Based in Douala, present in 8 African countries. EasyTech Group SA distributes the world's best IT solutions to equip and secure organizations across Africa.
